title: Salmon Migration Ladder: Spawning-Pool Assignment
seed_problem: Assign drones to delivery zones under per-drone capacity to maximize served weight
mutation: composite: generalize the bipartite/unit-capacity matching to a full Generalized Assignment Problem (per-(school,pool) values and volumes, per-pool holding capacities) and maximize total spawning value
strategies: first-fit baseline: guide each school into the lowest-indexed pool that still has room (the reference construction; ratio ~0.1)
value-density greedy: rank (school,pool) pairs by value-per-volume and assign each unassigned school to its best still-fitting pool in one pass
greedy + local search: start from the greedy assignment, then repeatedly move schools to higher-value fitting pools and admit unassigned schools where they fit, iterating until no improvement
capacity-aware / knapsack-per-pool style construction: treat each pool as a knapsack and trade schools between pools to raise total value
